harness: Claude Code v2.1.206 + Blender 5.1.2 via blender-mcp, in a Beckon terminal pane
notes: Perfect score. Photoreal soft-focus donut — dripping icing with drip edges, subsurface dough, depth of field, 139 objects with individually scattered sprinkles. Caught its own overexposed first render and re-lit within the one shot. 10m 38s.
